# MyDailyNeed

> Free developer utility tools that run entirely in your browser. No data leaves your machine — everything is processed locally. Includes JSON formatting, XML processing, text utilities, OCR image-to-text, and miscellaneous developer tools.

All tools are free, require no signup, and work offline. Data never leaves your browser. No server-side processing — 100% client-side.

## JSON Tools

- [JSON Formatter](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/json-formatter): Prettify and validate JSON with syntax highlighting and configurable indentation
- [JSON Minifier](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/json-minifier): Remove whitespace from JSON for compact output with size savings stats
- [JSON ↔ YAML Converter](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/json-yaml): Convert between JSON and YAML formats in both directions
- [JSON Attribute Extractor](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/json-attribute-extractor): Extract specific attributes from JSON using JSONPath expressions

## XML Tools

- [XML Formatter](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/xml-formatter): Prettify and validate XML with proper indentation
- [XML Minifier](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/xml-minifier): Strip whitespace from XML for compact output with optional comment preservation

## Text Tools

- [Base64 Encoder/Decoder](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/base64-encoder-decoder): Encode text to Base64 or decode Base64 back to text
- [URL Encoder/Decoder](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/url-encoder-decoder): Encode URLs for safe transmission or decode encoded URLs
- [Word Counter](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/word-counter): Count words, characters, sentences, paragraphs, lines, and reading time
- [Case Converter](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/case-converter): Convert text between uppercase, lowercase, camelCase, snake_case, and more
- [Duplicate Finder](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/duplicate-finder): Find duplicate items in a comma or newline separated list
- [Multiline to List](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/multiline-to-list): Convert multiline text to a comma-separated list
- [Diff Viewer](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/diff-viewer): Compare two texts side by side and highlight differences

## Image Tools

- [Image to Text (OCR)](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/image-to-text): Extract text from images using OCR technology powered by Tesseract.js — runs entirely in the browser

## Misc Tools

- [Timestamp Converter](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/timestamp-converter): Convert between Unix timestamps and human-readable dates
- [UUID Generator](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/uuid-generator): Generate random UUID v4 identifiers with uppercase/no-dash options
- [Color Converter](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/color-converter): Convert colors between HEX, RGB, and HSL formats with visual preview
- [Regex Tester](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/regex-tester): Test and validate regular expressions with live matching and match details
- [JWT Decoder](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/jwt-decoder): Decode JSON Web Tokens to view header and payload without sending them anywhere

## Optional

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/mydailyneed/mydailyneed): Source code and contribution guidelines
